2604.06903.title: Is Biomedical Specialization Still Worth It? Insights from Domain-Adaptive Language Modelling with a New French Health Corpus
2604.06903.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse domains, yet their adaptation to specialized fields remains challenging, particularly for non-English languages. This study investigates domain-adaptive pre-training (DAPT) as a strategy for specializing small to mid-sized LLMs in the French biomedical domain through continued pre-training. We address two key research questions: the viability of specialized continued pre-training for domain adaptation and the relationship between domain-specific performance gains and general capability degradation. Our contributions include the release of a fully open-licensed French biomedical corpus suitable for commercial and open-source applications, the training and release of specialized French biomedical LLMs, and novel insights for DAPT implementation. Our methodology encompasses the collection and refinement of high-quality French biomedical texts, the exploration of causal language modeling approaches using DAPT, and conducting extensive comparative evaluations. Our results cast doubt on the efficacy of DAPT, in contrast to previous works, but we highlight its viability in smaller-scale, resource-constrained scenarios under the right conditions. Findings in this paper further suggest that model merging post-DAPT is essential to mitigate generalization trade-offs, and in some cases even improves performance on specialized tasks at which the DAPT was directed.
2604.06903.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在各個領域展現了卓越的能力，但它們在專業領域的適應仍然具有挑戰性，特別是對於非英語語言。本研究探討了領域自適應預訓練（DAPT）作為一種策略，旨在通過持續預訓練使小型到中型的LLMs專精於法語生物醫學領域。我們針對兩個關鍵研究問題進行探討：專門的持續預訓練在領域適應中的可行性，以及領域特定性能提升與一般能力下降之間的關係。我們的貢獻包括釋放一個完全開放授權的法語生物醫學語料庫，適用於商業和開源應用，訓練並釋放專門的法語生物醫學LLMs，以及對DAPT實施的新見解。我們的方法論包括收集和精煉高質量的法語生物醫學文本，探索使用DAPT的因果語言建模方法，並進行廣泛的比較評估。我們的結果對DAPT的有效性提出了質疑，與以往的研究形成對比，但在適當條件下，我們強調它在小規模、資源受限的情境中的可行性。本文的發現進一步表明，在DAPT後進行模型合併對於減少泛化權衡至關重要，在某些情況下，甚至能改善在DAPT所針對的專業任務上的性能。
2604.06903.author: Aidan Mannion et.al.
2604.06903.authors: Aidan Mannion, Cécile Macaire, Armand Violle, Stéphane Ohayon, Xavier Tannier, Didier Schwab, Lorraine Goeuriot, François Portet
